Class ProductFixedPercentage

java.lang.Object
model.discount.Discount
model.discount.ProductDiscount
model.discount.ProductFixedPercentage
All Implemented Interfaces:
FixedPercentageDiscount
public class ProductFixedPercentage extends ProductDiscount implements FixedPercentageDiscount
It implements the Product discount whose type is FixedPercentage
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • ProductFixedPercentage

      public ProductFixedPercentage(String id, LocalDateTime startDate, LocalDateTime endDate, double percentage, StoreProduct... products) throws IllegalArgumentException
      A fixed percentage discount's general constructor with products
      Parameters:
      id - the discount's id
      startDate - the date when the discount starts
      endDate - the date when the discount ends
      percentage - the percentage deducted from a product's price
      products - the discount's products
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - the percentage wasn't between 0 and 100

    • ProductFixedPercentage

      public ProductFixedPercentage(String id, LocalDateTime startDate, LocalDateTime endDate, double percentage, boolean overWholeStore) throws IllegalArgumentException
      A fixed percentage discount's general constructor over the whole store
      Parameters:
      id - the discount's id
      startDate - the date when the discount starts
      endDate - the date when the discount ends
      percentage - the percentage deducted from a product's price
      overWholeStore - whether the discount is applied over the whole store or not (must be true)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - the percentage wasn't between 0 and 100

    • ProductFixedPercentage

      public ProductFixedPercentage(LocalDateTime startDate, LocalDateTime endDate, double percentage, StoreProduct... products) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Instantiates a new fixed percentage discount with products
      Parameters:
      startDate - the date when the discount starts
      endDate - the date when the discount ends
      percentage - the percentage deducted from a product's price
      products - the discount's products
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - the percentage wasn't between 0 and 100

    • ProductFixedPercentage

      public ProductFixedPercentage(LocalDateTime startDate, LocalDateTime endDate, double percentage, boolean overWholeStore) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Instantiates a new fixed percentage discount over the whole store
      Parameters:
      startDate - the date when the discount starts
      endDate - the date when the discount ends
      percentage - the percentage deducted from a product's price
      overWholeStore - whether the discount is applied over the whole store or not (must be true)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - the percentage wasn't between 0 and 100

      Specified by:

      Throws:
